name: office-verdict
description: A lightweight office voting app with colleague and Would You Rather rounds.

scripts.check: node --check public/app.js && node --check public/admin-v3.js && node --check public/admin-import.js && node --check public/history.js && node --check netlify/functions/_shared.mjs && node --check netlify/functions/_question-types.mjs && node --check netlify/functions/status.mjs && node --check netlify/functions/vote.mjs && node --check netlify/functions/history.mjs && node --check netlify/functions/admin-data.mjs && node --check netlify/functions/admin-question.mjs && node --check netlify/functions/admin-comment.mjs && node --check netlify/functions/admin-person.mjs && node --check netlify/functions/admin-export.mjs
